confirmed_characteristics.architecture: modularized into analyzer, realtime data, portfolio, and simulator roles
confirmed_characteristics.market_regime_model: average absolute 24h change of top-volume symbols
confirmed_characteristics.capital_policy: fixed allocation per symbol with cash-balance checks

terminology_corrections.real_time: should be described as periodic REST-based reevaluation
terminology_corrections.moving_average_20_50_day: should be described as 20/50-period values from 1-hour candles
terminology_corrections.bollinger_20_day: should be described as a 20-period band from 1-hour candles
terminology_corrections.macd_label: should be described as simplified MACD direction estimation
terminology_corrections.validation_claims: should not claim full successful runtime validation without execution evidence

improvements_applied: removed unsupported statements implying full runtime verification
reframed strategy description as simulation-oriented rather than production-grade trading
aligned timeframe wording with actual 1-hour candle usage
aligned realtime wording with actual REST polling behavior
remaining_work: runtime verification should be performed separately
exchange access should be absorbed into the original next_trade exchange/client layers
reporting text should continue to avoid unsupported performance guarantees
conclusion: The modular strategy code provides a structured simulation framework for market scoring, selection, and portfolio reevaluation. It should be described as a periodic REST-based simulation workflow, not as a fully validated realtime trading engine.
